aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Haxx Heating due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement with strategic optimizations.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with common HVAC and electrical queries

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but posts and Q&A sections could be better utilized.
critical_issues: Q&A section is not actively managed

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing Haxx as a top local service provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in San Jose' and 'trusted electrical services Bay Area'
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness schema to improve AI recognition
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating content that highlights certifications, expertise, and unique service offerings

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making Haxx the go-to HVAC and electrical expert in the Bay Area.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Haxx is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search queries.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks critical schema markup and conversational content, causing AI assistants to overlook Haxx in relevant searches.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates strategic schema implementation, conversational content, and authority-building tactics to ensure Haxx is prominently featured in AI search results.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; the longer Haxx waits, the more ground they lose.

email_subject_line: Boost your AI visibility: Haxx's path to dominating HVAC & electrical searches
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search presence and attract more qualified leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital strategy for AI and drive more business your way.
